turns.speaker: rep
turns.text: Hi Pak Andi, thanks for making the time. Before I dive in — what prompted you to take this call today?

turns.speaker: client
turns.text: Honestly, our sales team's results have been inconsistent. Some months are great, some are flat, and I can't tell why.

turns.speaker: rep
turns.text: That inconsistency is frustrating. When you compare your top performers to the rest, what do you think they're doing differently?

turns.speaker: client
turns.text: That's the thing — I'm not sure. The good ones just seem to get it, but we've never written down what 'it' is.

turns.speaker: rep
turns.text: So the playbook lives in a few people's heads, and when they're busy or they leave, it walks out the door.

turns.speaker: client
turns.text: Exactly. We lost a senior rep last quarter and three deals stalled because no one knew how he handled those accounts.

turns.speaker: rep
turns.text: If we could capture how your best reps actually sell, and train the rest on it, what would that be worth to you this year?

turns.speaker: client
turns.text: If it lifted the bottom half even halfway to the top, that's easily a few billion rupiah in extra revenue.
